mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CONTENT ( CONTENT_NO, TMDB_ID, CONTENT_TYPE, TITLE, ORIGINAL_TITLE, OVERVIEW, POSTER_PATH, BACKDROP_PATH, RELEASE_DATE, GENRE_TEXT, RUNTIME, EPISODE_COUNT, DIRECTOR, CAST_NAMES, AGE_RATING, TMDB_SCORE, VIEW_COUNT, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( SEQ_CONTENT_NO.NEXTVAL, #{tmdbId}, #{contentType}, #{title}, #{originalTitle}, #{overview}, #{posterPath}, #{backdropPath}, #{releaseDate}, #{genreText}, #{runtime}, #{episodeCount}, #{director}, #{castNames}, #{ageRating}, #{tmdbScore}, 0, SYSDATE )
